WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC
BRAZIL-NORTH COAST.
DNC 01.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING
   101000Z TO 192100Z DEC IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 02-18.96S 044-22.09W, 02-17.38S 044-22.54W,
      02-15.39S 044-20.21W, 02-18.37S 044-18.12W,
      02-19.91S 044-20.76W.
   B. 01-12.54S 043-46.66W, 00-18.98S 042-42.53W,
      01-20.38S 041-59.02W, 02-02.23S 043-11.61W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 192200Z DEC 21.
